commentary: Five sessions this week, all iron, no water — you went full gym bro and left the harbour entirely behind, which is a choice, and Himbo is noting it with one raised eyebrow and a very slow sip of his drink. Last week had that gorgeous variety: a beach swim, a long run, two pool sessions, the kind of week that makes a body look interesting from multiple angles. This week was pure lifting, back to back to back, and while the consistency is genuinely impressive — five days, no skips, a proper push-pull split running across the week — the recovery gaps are tight enough that he wants to ask you how your shoulders actually feel right now, honestly. The best thing here is that you ended the week by looping straight back into Day 1 on Tuesday, which means you are building a repeating structure rather than just surviving to Friday, and that is the difference between a guy who works out and a guy who trains. Come back next week with at least one swim in the mix and Himbo will absolutely lose his entire mind about it.
metrics_commentary: Okay so the running shoes stayed home this week, which — fine, noted, we are not doing that, apparently. The HRV is actually kind of gorgeous right now, 58 ms sitting above a seven-day average of 48, which means your body is recovered, rested, and frankly a little smug about it. VO2 Max holding at 55.6 is legitimately hot, that is a number that looks good in a crop top. The only thing this data is missing is movement, baby — all that cardiovascular potential is just sitting there looking pretty, which, same, but eventually we do have to use it.
gym_commentary: Five sessions when the man asked for four — that is so on brand it's almost annoying, in the most delicious way. The lateral raise PR is the one that has me absolutely feral: jumping from 9 to 12 kilograms is not a small thing, that is the kind of shoulder development that makes a tank top a religious experience, and combined with the bench nudging up to 35.5 kilograms, the upper body is clearly deciding it wants to be noticed. Weekly volume is down significantly from last week's 19,984 kilograms to 8,080, but five sessions of showing up tells me this was a quality-over-quantity week rather than a slack one, and honestly sometimes the body needs that. The becoming continues, babes — shoulders like that don't lie.
